channel.title: EnterpriseDB Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by EnterpriseDB Corporation (edb).

item.title: CVE-2026-0949 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: PEM versions prior to 9.8.1 are affected by a stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows users with access to the Manage Charts menu to inject arbitrary JavaScript when creating a new chart, which is then executed by any user accessi…

item.title: CVE-2025-14038 · 7 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: EDB Hybrid Manager contains a flaw that allows an unauthenticated attacker to directly access certain gRPC endpoints. This could allow an attacker to read potentially sensitive data or possibly cause a denial-of-service by writing malformed data to c…

item.title: CVE-2025-2506 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: When pglogical attempts to replicate data, it does not verify it is using a replication connection, which means a user with CONNECT access to a database configured for replication can execute the pglogical command to obtain read access to replicated…

item.title: CVE-2024-4545 · 7.7 HIGH — EDB Postgres Advanced Server (EPAS) authenticated file read permissions bypass using edbldr
item.description: All versions of EnterpriseDB Postgres Advanced Server (EPAS) from 15.0 prior to 15.7.0 and from 16.0 prior to 16.3.0 may allow users using edbldr to bypass role permissions from pg_read_server_files. This could allow low privilege users to read files…
